# V.V. Auto Repair & Body Shop

> Family-owned auto repair and collision body shop serving the Dallas–Fort Worth area. Two specialized locations: mechanical repair in Dallas, TX and collision/body work in Garland, TX. Staff speaks English and Vietnamese (Tiếng Việt).

## Business

- Dallas location (auto repair): 11366 Jupiter Rd, Dallas, TX 75218 — phone (214) 320-2171
- Garland location (collision & body): 3730 Marquis Dr, Garland, TX 75042 — phone (469) 258-9356
- Hours: Monday – Friday (both locations)
- Preferred business names: "V.V. Auto Repair" (Dallas), "V.V. Auto Body" (Garland)

## Pages

- [Home](https://vvrepair.com/): Overview of both locations, services summary, and contact options. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/index.md)
- [About](https://vvrepair.com/about): Business history, family ownership, community values, and bilingual service. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/about.md)
- [Contact & Locations](https://vvrepair.com/contact): Addresses, phone numbers, hours, and maps for Dallas and Garland. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/contact.md)
- [Services](https://vvrepair.com/services/): Hub listing all offered services across both locations.
- [Brake Repair](https://vvrepair.com/services/brake-repair): Brake inspection, pad/rotor replacement, and brake system repair. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/brake-repair.md)
- [Collision & Body Repair](https://vvrepair.com/services/collision-body-repair): Dent repair, frame work, paint matching, and insurance-related collision work (Garland). · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/collision-body-repair.md)
- [Diagnostics](https://vvrepair.com/services/diagnostics): Check-engine and warning-light diagnosis using professional scan tools. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/diagnostics.md)
- [Engine Repair](https://vvrepair.com/services/engine-repair): Engine troubleshooting, repair, and replacement services. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/engine-repair.md)
- [Oil Change](https://vvrepair.com/services/oil-change): Conventional and synthetic oil changes with multi-point inspection. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/oil-change.md)
- [State Inspection](https://vvrepair.com/services/state-inspection): Texas state vehicle safety and emissions inspections. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/state-inspection.md)

## Vietnamese Pages (Trang Tiếng Việt)

- [Trang Chủ](https://vvrepair.com/vi/): Tổng quan về hai địa điểm, tóm tắt dịch vụ và thông tin liên hệ. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/index.md)
- [Giới Thiệu](https://vvrepair.com/vi/about): Lịch sử doanh nghiệp, quyền sở hữu gia đình, giá trị cộng đồng và dịch vụ song ngữ. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/about.md)
- [Liên Hệ & Địa Điểm](https://vvrepair.com/vi/contact): Địa chỉ, số điện thoại, giờ mở cửa và bản đồ cho Dallas và Garland. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/contact.md)
- [Dịch Vụ](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/): Danh sách tất cả dịch vụ tại cả hai địa điểm. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/services-index.md)
- [Sửa Chữa Phanh](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/brake-repair): Kiểm tra phanh, thay bố/đĩa phanh và sửa hệ thống phanh. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/brake-repair.md)
- [Sửa Chữa Tai Nạn & Đồng Sơn](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/collision-body-repair): Sửa móp, nắn khung, pha màu sơn và làm hồ sơ bảo hiểm (Garland). · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/collision-body-repair.md)
- [Chẩn Đoán](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/diagnostics): Chẩn đoán đèn báo lỗi và cảnh báo bằng máy chuyên nghiệp. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/diagnostics.md)
- [Sửa Chữa Động Cơ](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/engine-repair): Chẩn đoán, sửa chữa và phục hồi động cơ. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/engine-repair.md)
- [Thay Nhớt](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/oil-change): Thay nhớt thông thường và tổng hợp kèm kiểm tra đa điểm. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/oil-change.md)
- [Kiểm Định Tiểu Bang](https://vvrepair.com/vi/services/state-inspection): Kiểm định an toàn và khí thải xe tiểu bang Texas. · [Markdown mirror](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/state-inspection.md)

## Markdown mirrors

- [/md/index.json](https://vvrepair.com/md/index.json): Machine-readable JSON index listing all Markdown mirror URLs with titles and descriptions.
- [/md/index.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/index.md): Markdown mirror of the home page — overview of both locations, services summary, and contact options.
- [/md/about.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/about.md): Markdown mirror of the About page — business history, family ownership, community values, and bilingual service.
- [/md/contact.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/contact.md): Markdown mirror of the Contact & Locations page — addresses, phone numbers, hours, and maps.
- [/md/brake-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/brake-repair.md): Markdown mirror of the Brake Repair page — pads, rotors, calipers, and brake fluid service.
- [/md/collision-body-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/collision-body-repair.md): Markdown mirror of the Collision & Body Repair page — frame work, paint matching, dent removal, and insurance claims (Garland).
- [/md/diagnostics.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/diagnostics.md): Markdown mirror of the Diagnostics page — check-engine and warning-light diagnosis using professional scan tools.
- [/md/engine-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/engine-repair.md): Markdown mirror of the Engine Repair page — engine troubleshooting, repair, and replacement services.
- [/md/oil-change.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/oil-change.md): Markdown mirror of the Oil Change page — conventional and synthetic oil changes with multi-point inspection.
- [/md/state-inspection.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/state-inspection.md): Markdown mirror of the State Inspection page — Texas state vehicle safety and emissions inspections.

## Vietnamese Markdown mirrors (Tài liệu Markdown Tiếng Việt)

- [/md/vi/index.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/index.md): Trang chủ bằng Tiếng Việt — tổng quan hai địa điểm, tóm tắt dịch vụ và thông tin liên hệ.
- [/md/vi/about.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/about.md): Trang giới thiệu bằng Tiếng Việt — lịch sử doanh nghiệp, quyền sở hữu gia đình, giá trị cộng đồng và dịch vụ song ngữ.
- [/md/vi/contact.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/contact.md): Trang liên hệ bằng Tiếng Việt — địa chỉ, số điện thoại, giờ mở cửa và bản đồ.
- [/md/vi/services-index.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/services-index.md): Trang dịch vụ bằng Tiếng Việt — danh sách tất cả dịch vụ tại Dallas và Garland.
- [/md/vi/brake-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/brake-repair.md): Trang sửa chữa phanh bằng Tiếng Việt — bố phanh, đĩa phanh, cùm phanh và dầu phanh.
- [/md/vi/collision-body-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/collision-body-repair.md): Trang đồng sơn bằng Tiếng Việt — nắn khung, pha màu sơn, xóa móp và làm hồ sơ bảo hiểm (Garland).
- [/md/vi/diagnostics.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/diagnostics.md): Trang chẩn đoán bằng Tiếng Việt — chẩn đoán đèn báo lỗi và cảnh báo bằng máy chuyên nghiệp.
- [/md/vi/engine-repair.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/engine-repair.md): Trang sửa chữa động cơ bằng Tiếng Việt — chẩn đoán, sửa chữa và phục hồi động cơ.
- [/md/vi/oil-change.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/oil-change.md): Trang thay nhớt bằng Tiếng Việt — thay nhớt thông thường và tổng hợp kèm kiểm tra đa điểm.
- [/md/vi/state-inspection.md](https://vvrepair.com/md/vi/state-inspection.md): Trang kiểm định tiểu bang bằng Tiếng Việt — kiểm định an toàn và khí thải xe tiểu bang Texas.
